Hero.headline: Technology mastery shaped by European expertise and nearshore proximity.
Hero.subheadline: Custom enterprise software designed with clarity, ownership, and balance, built to support complex operations and long-term growth.

Story.title: The dot. The pause. The potential.
Story.intro: dotWhite starts with a simple idea: every complex system can become clear when the right people ask the right questions at the right time.

origin.title: From Dot to Direction
origin.text: A dot is the beginning. It marks a position, then a path. Our work starts the same way: one clear decision at a time.

enterprise.title: Built for Real Complexity
enterprise.text: We build custom enterprise software and internal tools that handle evolving workflows, data volume, and integrations.

feeling.title: Calm by Design
feeling.text: Our products should feel intentional and steady: minimal, precise, and never loud.

client.title: How It Should Feel
client.text: Working with dotWhite should feel guided and reliable, with complexity handled quietly in the background.

Story.enterprise: We build custom enterprise software and internal tools for high-volume workflows, integrating with platforms like SharePoint, Salesforce, and SAP.
Story.outro: Working with dotWhite should feel calm, steady, and intentional, with complexity handled quietly in the background.

CoreValues.title: Principles Behind Every Delivery
CoreValues.subtitle: Our values do not describe a state of utopian stillness, they accurately describe the challenges and difficulties we strive to overcome on a daily basis in order to be able to provide high quality services and maintain a healthy work-life balance.

clarity.title: Create Clarity
clarity.text: It’s easy to get lost and lose focus. We need a single point of reference. We need a mental map to guide ourselves through the maze of complex requirements. We need to strive to create clarity.

ownership.title: Take Ownership
ownership.text: Ownership empowers people to constant growth and nurtures problem solving. It’s something that we willingly and happily take upon ourselves for our common goals.

balance.title: Seek Balance
balance.text: True balance isn’t a fixed state; it’s a rhythm. It lives in motion, in the way we adapt, adjust, and find harmony between focus and flow. Balance isn’t something to chase, but something to practice.
